title: AllTheMons [Cobblemon]
description: A combination of several datapacks, with permission from the creators. More info on the discord and in the description.
body:
## What is AllTheMons?
AllTheMons _(not affiliated with the Curseforge Modpack)_ is a collaborative effort from many contributors to add as many Pokemon as possible to Cobblemon. All of the included addons have been modified to ensure that there's no overlap, which prevents game-breaking bugs/crashes you would experience without AllTheMons. 

## How to install:
<details>
<summary>Click for instructions!</summary>

### Singleplayer:
**Put the .zip in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`**  
**Put the .zip in `/resourcepacks`**  
**Enable in game `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`**  

### Servers:
**Put the .zip in `/world/datapacks`**    
_Sometimes it's called myworld, or something similar, sometimes it has a name instead_    
_If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server providers guide on how to add datapacks_  

**Every Player has to have the .zip installed as a `Resource Pack`**  
_Best option if for them to have it installed and enabled in their clients_    
_It's possible to add them to server resources, but note that there have been issues with this for some cobblemon addons, so try whatever method suits you better_  
</details>

## Included features:
- Adds more than [150 unique Pokémon](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ccaWNm_0T3_0gx9qqYkaiFxoZH4tiUEGLfUkZb7lK0U) to expand Cobblemon!
- All of them are obtainable in survival without compromises!
- Fixed & added most Pokédex entries and descriptions
- Riding support for lots of the added Pokémon
- Somewhat lore accurate spawn locations
- Includes many regional variants

## Where do all those Pokémon spawn?
- To find that out you have to first join the [AllTheMons Discord](https://discord.com/invite/few6NPdXjD) and then type `!spawns` in the bot-commands channel. From there our fully automated bot will tell you all about the spawns like their rarity, spawn conditions, requirements and the biomes!  

## What else is the discord for?
- Active support team to help you with installation, compatibility, troubleshooting and more!
- Donate to or learn more about the included addons and our contributors!
- Add suggestions and report bugs for ATM!

## Permissions & License _(for usage on modpacks and public servers)_
<details>
<summary>Click to unfold!</summary>
  
All Developers of these packs gave their full permission for their assets to be used, proof of these can be found within the addon file, in a folder titled _"Proofs of Permission"_  
We did not create any models, textures, or animations, that's not to say the ATM team didn't do anything though - this pack has hours and hours of work put into its spawns, species files, bug fixing, creating documentation, and much, much more, all done by EasySqueeze, Mayayoh, N8nt and myself.  
Due to the collaborative effort, AllTheMons has a **strict** license to make this even possible in the first place. Read it before starting a server or modpack containing the addon. You can find it [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1vBFYBIpBCMDAHCwV7BDfQnachftFxBhv0AsrC_-ZcTo/edit?tab=t.b3tozy6290sj#bookmark=id.4tomjw6ue6px).
</details>

## All currently included addons:

<summary>Click to unfold!</summary>

[GenoMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons) by **GenotypeXD**    
[HiddenMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon) by **LegenTM**    
[Hydro's Reanimodel Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hydro-reanimodel-pack/versions) by **BlazeHydroxide**    
[The Jewel Pokemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-jewel-pokmon-cobblemon) by **NetImmerse**    
[Kale's Collection](https://modrinth.com/datapack/kales-cobblemon-collection) by **Kale**    
[LackingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lackingmons) by **Beezy** and **IZetyXX**    
[Liberty Garden](https://modrinth.com/datapack/liberty-garden) by **Lvnatic**    
[MissingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon) by **RedRibbon**    
[Monkeymons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/monkeymons) by **Bonanca**    
[MoreMons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moremons) by **YaBoiBruno**    
[MundialMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mundialmons) by **Alexiocraft**    
[Nadymons3](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nadymons3) by **Nady3**    
[OdysseyMons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/odysseymons) by **BifeSalgado** & **Aki4hiro**    
[Pigeon's PokePack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/pigeons-poke-pack) by **ElPigeon**    
[Pokemans Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans) by **Tontra, Lazaro, Pandalistics**, and **ASHISK**    
[Soul Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/soul-megas-free-megas-for-all) by **Sanji**    
[Swirlix and Slurpuff for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-swirlix-and-slurpuff) by **ARaccoonNamedFish**    
[WaviMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wavimons-(cobblemon)) by **Bwavii**    

</details>
